plan_summary.primary_goal: Execute India's postponed decennial census across 1.4B people / 240M+ households between April 2026 and April 2027 under the Pioneer's Gambit strategy, achieving 99%+ coverage, publishing provisional totals within 6 months, and releasing the full caste-inclusive dataset within 18 months of Phase 2 completion.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the budget overrun margin against the ₹15,000 crore ceiling; the household-coverage margin against the 99% target; the provisional-publish timing margin against the 6-month deadline; the cloud-ingestion MTTR margin against the 4-hour ceiling; and the device-audit-failure margin against the 1% threshold. Caste-methodology Q4 2025 lockdown, Judicial Review Board constitution by Q3 2025, and state-government MoU cooperation are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Budget ceiling
key_values.comment: Upper bound of the ₹12,000–15,000 crore envelope; budget overrun >5% (₹750 crore) forces austerity cuts to quality-assurance processes per Risk 7.
key_values.source_text: budget high estimate: 15,000 crore ₹ — core project cost ceiling.

key_values.label: Household enumeration coverage target
key_values.comment: Below 99% the primary viability gate fails; the Pioneer's Gambit hybrid digital/paper redundancy exists specifically to defend this metric.
key_values.source_text: household coverage success target: 99% of households — viability gate.

key_values.label: Provisional-total publication deadline
key_values.comment: Provisional totals must publish within 6 months of Phase 2 completion (≈Oct 2027) to feed Lok Sabha delimitation; missing this triggers political crisis.
key_values.source_text: If provisional population totals are not published within 6 months of Phase 2 completion, then the success criterion fails immediately.

key_values.label: Maximum tolerable cloud-ingestion MTTR
key_values.comment: Cloud architecture must restore from a system-wide ingestion failure within 4 hours; longer outages delay validation and salary payouts, risking enumerator attrition.
key_values.source_text: Cloud synchronization pipeline can achieve a maximum restoration time objective of four (4) hours.

key_values.label: Device audit-failure trigger threshold
key_values.comment: Above 1% device-audit failure (chain-of-custody loss/theft/damage) supervisory penalties trigger; the 10% emergency-procurement scenario costs ₹400–600 crore.
key_values.source_text: If device audit failures exceed 1%, then this metric triggers supervisory penalties linked to performance metrics.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected end-to-end census spend
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test whether the ₹15,000 crore ceiling absorbs Phase 1+2 execution including satellite hubs, paper audits, security overhead, and the ₹400–600 crore device-replacement scenario named in Risk 5.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: device CapEx (3M units) + enumerator pay × 3M + satellite contract + paper audit logistics + security + DAMF + contingency; sensitivity to Risk 5 emergency procurement and Risk 7 austerity scenarios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected household enumeration coverage achieved
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the Pioneer's Gambit redundancy clears the 99% gate against Risk 1 (tech failures, 2–5% coverage drop) and Risk 6 (fluid-population undercount, 5–10% downside).
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Project Phase 1 pilot coverage scaled by district-level connectivity profile; sensitivity to satellite-hub failure rate and the 72-hour paper-audit capacity confirmed by state MoUs.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved months from Phase 2 to provisional release
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the 6-month deadline triggers political crisis around delimitation; Risk 2 names a 2–3 month JRB arbitration slip as the dominant timing pressure.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Phase 2 close-out plus aggregation + JRB review + statistical-body credibility review timeline; sensitivity to state non-cooperation (Risk 2) and cloud-MTTR cascading delays.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Observed cloud-ingestion MTTR under peak 3x load
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Expert Issue 3 sensitivity: MTTR > 4 hours produces a 10-day supervisor-review delay and a 2-week salary delay, cascading into 2–4 week project slip and 0.5% data-integrity drop.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Per Data Item 4: dedicated JMeter peak-load simulation at 3× average daily volume for 72 continuous hours with planned failover injections; benchmark against major national digital-transaction systems.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected device audit-failure rate across the 3M-unit fleet
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Risk 5 models a 10% device loss/failure as the worst case (₹400–600 crore emergency procurement); the 1% threshold is the supervisory-penalty trigger.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Three-supplier diversification × GPS chain-of-custody integrity rate × theft/damage incidence in high-risk zones; calibrate on 2021 NRC-style trial deployments where available.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget overrun margin against the ₹15,000 crore ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps the project within budget; negative margin forces austerity that the Risk 7 mitigation says will cut verification-survey quality assurance.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Household coverage margin against the 99% target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin satisfies the primary viability criterion; negative margin invalidates the entire Pioneer's Gambit thesis and the methodological-credibility metric tied to statistical-body acceptance.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Provisional-publish timing margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin clears the 6-month deadline for delimitation data; negative margin triggers the political-crisis path that the data-sequencing strategy (population before caste) is designed to prevent.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Cloud-ingestion MTTR margin against the 4-hour ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps salary validation and real-time monitoring intact; negative margin triggers the Expert Issue 3 cascade of supervisor-review delay, salary delay, attrition, and timeline slip.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Device-audit-failure margin against the 1% threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps supervisory penalties dormant and the chain-of-custody intact; negative margin escalates toward the Risk 5 10% loss scenario and the ₹400–600 crore emergency-procurement spend.

unmodelled_gates.label: ECI and NSC sign off on the final caste methodology by Q4 2025
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Expert Issue 1 and Assumption Issue 1 name this as the load-bearing political-credibility assumption; training 3M enumerators on a moving methodology invalidates the entire data-integrity argument regardless of any operational margin the model evaluates.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Retraining and manual reprint costs ₹50–100 crore per Issue 1 sensitivity; quality-validation error rates spike from 5% to 15–20%; statistical-body credibility rejection invalidates the caste-table milestone.

unmodelled_gates.label: Judicial Review Board legally constituted with statutory authority by Q3 2025
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Decision 4 routes all data-sequencing disputes through the JRB; without statutory authority before Phase 1, the 6-month provisional-release deadline cannot be defended against state non-cooperation (Risk 2).
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Provisional release slips past 6 months per Risk 2 sensitivity (2–3 month aggregation delay); delimitation deadline missed; political crisis around constituency boundaries.

unmodelled_gates.label: State governments commit 80% of local staff to paper audits and dual supervision
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Decision 6 and Assumption Q7 treat state-machinery cooperation as binary; without 80% local-staff dedication the 72-hour paper-audit window collapses and the Pioneer's Gambit redundancy fails on the 10% of blocks the satellite hubs cover.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Paper-audit capacity falls below the 72-hour window; digital-failure scenarios cascade directly into coverage gaps; the 99% target becomes unreachable in non-cooperating states (Risk 2).
